message:
feat(palette): add viewport-based scrolling for command list

Implements proper scrolling for the command palette when there are more
items than fit in the terminal height. This addresses the second part of
issue #42.

Changes:
- Added viewport.Model from bubbles for managing scroll state
- Added scroll keybindings: PageUp/Down, Ctrl+U/D (half page), Home/End (g/G)
- Viewport auto-scrolls to keep cursor visible when navigating
- Mouse wheel scrolling support via tea.MouseMsg handling
- Scroll percentage indicator when content overflows
- Help bar shows scroll hint when applicable

The viewport clips content to the visible area and handles all scroll
offset calculations internally, eliminating the previous overflow issue.

Closes #42

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
